title: goniopteris retroflexa
intro: Goniopteris retroflexa, also known as the flexible tree fern, is a type of fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, which makes it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Goniopteris retroflexa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and stems being used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
